title: Breaking into Impel Down: Key Exchange
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as the scene develops across pages 10–13.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of breaking into impel down: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: for a second... i saw okama paradise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yup, totally easy. See that giant wall?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Climb it and take a look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's just like you said, straw-chan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Level 4 is like a giant kettle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: and a blazing sea of fire....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You can jump down from here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're putting your life on the line!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The Queen of the Kamabaka Kingdom!!!
